assessment.note: He can follow request paths but still lacks historical context behind tradeoffs, which is a mild remaining clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff context
new_queue.name: Which tradeoffs feel hardest to read without the backstory?
new_queue.description: Drills into the missing historical context he named so the manager can target the right orientation support.

new_queue.label: Ownership edges
new_queue.name: Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy to you?
new_queue.description: Checks whether Riley knows where his remit starts and stops before he makes decisions.

new_queue.label: Good call line
new_queue.name: What feels like a safe call for you to make on your own right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces how Riley is calibrating autonomy versus escalation in the role.

new_queue.label: Missing context
new_queue.name: What are you still waiting to understand before you change an architecture assumption?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific context gaps that could lead to wrong technical decisions.

new_queue.label: Decision risk
new_queue.name: Where does the current design feel riskiest to you?
new_queue.description: Identifies the spots where incomplete understanding could quietly create rework later.

new_queue.label: Support network
new_queue.name: Who would you want to pull in first when you need context fast?
new_queue.description: Looks for the people and channels that should become Riley’s default support network.

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the check-in into concrete onboarding support and next-step alignment.
